title: Visual General Intelligence –Vision Research Toward the AGI Era–
subtitle: CVPR 2026 Workshop

overview.mission: This workshop aims to bring together researchers and practitioners in the field of machine learning to discuss the latest advances and challenges in computer vision applications. We focus on innovative approaches, emerging techniques, and real-world implementations.
keyTopics: Recognition, generation, reconstruction, any visual/multi-modal tasks in limited situations
{Self, Semi, Weakly, Un}-supervised learning with very limited resources
{Zero, One, Few}-shot learning with very limited resources
Training convnets, transformers, diffusion, foundation models, and any other models with relatively fewer resources
Applications in healthcare, robotics, and autonomous systems

latestNews.title: Workshop page open
latestNews.content: We are excited to announce that our workshop page is now live. We will continue to add information, so please check back regularly for updates.
